# System Overview

> **Scope**: High-level architecture, project structure, and dependency topology for the plugin monolith framework.
> **Confidence**: Low
> **Last updated**: 2026-05-16
> **Source entries**: OBS-000

- ❓ Baseline framework includes Core, Host, Modules, Plugins, and Adapters.
- ❓ Host acts as composition root for runtime wiring and plugin lifecycle orchestration.
